bactopia-catalog.name: bactopia-catalog
bactopia-catalog.help:
Generate machine-readable catalog of all Bactopia components.

Produces catalog.json containing workflows, subworkflows, and modules
with their contracts (takes/emits), dependencies, and metadata.
Replaces data/workflows.yml as the authoritative component index.

Optionally also renders llms.txt from a Jinja2 template when
--llms-output is provided.

options.name: version
options.help: Show the version and exit.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Print debug related text

options.name: silent
options.help: Only critical errors will be printed

options.name: bactopia_path
options.help: Directory where Bactopia repository is stored

options.name: output_path
options.help: Output path for catalog.json (default: stdout)

options.name: pretty
options.help: Pretty-print JSON output

options.name: llms_output_path
options.help: Also render llms.txt to this path. Uses the bundled template at bactopia/templates/bactopia/llms.txt.j2 unless --llms-template is provided

options.name: llms_template_path
options.help: Jinja2 template for llms.txt. Defaults to the template bundled inside bactopia-py

bactopia-citations.name: bactopia-citations
bactopia-citations.help:
Print or validate citations used throughout Bactopia.

Default mode prints the full citation list (or one entry with --name).
Pass --validate to instead scan the repo for orphan keys (defined but
never referenced) and workflow @citation keys that don't resolve to
an entry in citations.yml. Module and subworkflow @citation keys are
validated by bactopia-lint (rules M035 and S019).

options.name: version
options.help: Show the version and exit.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Print debug related text

options.name: silent
options.help: Only critical errors will be printed

options.name: bactopia_path
options.help: Directory where Bactopia repository is stored

options.name: name
options.help: Only print citation matching a given name

options.name: plain_text
options.help: Disable rich formatting

options.name: validate
options.help: Validate citation integrity: orphan keys + workflow @citation references

options.name: as_json
options.help: Emit validation results as JSON (use with --validate)

bactopia-docs.name: bactopia-docs
bactopia-docs.help:
Validate reference-doc staleness across a Bactopia repo.

Two checks run against every .md file under [b]--docs-path[/b]:

[b]Deprecated patterns (D0xx)[/b]: regex matches against
[b]--patterns-file[/b] entries — phrases retired by past migrations
(e.g. ``flattenPaths``, the 4-channel emission framing).

[b]Ground-truth assertions (D1xx)[/b]: counts (D101-D103), Nextflow
version (D104), bactopia-py CLI references (D105), lint rule IDs
(D106), markdown link targets (D108).

Suppress a rule on a single line with
``<!-- bactopia-docs: ignore D0xx -->`` (or a comma-separated list).

Exits 1 if any FAIL is found.

options.name: version
options.help: Show the version and exit.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Print debug related text

options.name: silent
options.help: Only critical errors will be printed

options.name: bactopia_path
options.help: Directory where Bactopia repository is stored

options.name: docs_path
options.help: Docs directory relative to --bactopia-path

options.name: patterns_file
options.help: Deprecated-patterns YAML relative to --bactopia-path

options.name: bactopia_py_path
options.help: Path to bactopia-py repo (for D105 CLI / D106 lint-rule checks). Defaults to <bactopia-path>/../bactopia-py

options.name: skip_path_check
options.help: Skip D108 markdown-link target resolution

options.name: validate
options.help: Run validation (default action; flag is accepted for parity with bactopia-citations)

options.name: as_json
options.help: Emit results as JSON

options.name: plain_text
options.help: Disable rich formatting

bactopia-sysinfo.name: bactopia-sysinfo
bactopia-sysinfo.help:
Auto-detect host RAM and CPUs, emit Nextflow CLI fragments for local profiles.

Reads the bactopia wrapper's argv as a passthrough. Emits to stdout the
additional `--max_memory <N>.GB` / `--max_cpus <N>` flags that should be
appended to the `nextflow run` command line. Emits nothing when:

  - a custom config is supplied (`-c` or `--nfconfig`)
  - any `-profile` value is not in the local-executor allow-list
  - both `--max_memory` and `--max_cpus` are already set by the user
  - the invocation is informational (`--help`, `--help_all`, `--list_wfs`)

bactopia-test.name: bactopia-test
bactopia-test.help:
Run nf-test suites for Bactopia components.

Discovers and executes nf-test files across modules, subworkflows, and
workflows. Results are classified by status and displayed as a summary
table. Per-test logs are saved to a logs/ directory.

options.help: Directory containing bactopia-tests data (sets BACTOPIA_TESTS env). Required unless --cleanup

options.name: tier
options.help: Which component tier to test

options.name: include
options.help: Comma-separated list of component names to include

options.name: exclude
options.help: Comma-separated list of component names to exclude

options.name: profile
options.help: Nextflow profile to use for tests

options.name: condadir
options.help: Directory where Conda environments are stored (NXF_CONDA_CACHEDIR env variable takes precedence)

options.name: singularity_cache
options.help: Directory where Singularity images are stored (NXF_SINGULARITY_CACHEDIR env variable takes precedence)

options.name: generate
options.help: Generate mode: delete snapshots and run twice to verify reproducibility

options.name: jobs
options.help: Number of parallel test workers

options.name: fail_fast
options.help: Stop on the first test failure instead of continuing

options.name: timeout
options.help: Per-test timeout in minutes. Each nf-test subprocess is killed after this duration. Set to 0 to disable

options.name: cleanup
options.help: Find and remove all .nf-test/ temp files, then exit (no tests run)

options.name: dry_run
options.help: With --cleanup, list what would be removed without deleting

options.name: outdir
options.help: Directory to write the logs/ folder into

options.name: keep
options.help: Keep .nf-test/ directories and logs after tests pass (useful for debugging)

options.name: use_json
options.help: Output results as JSON

bactopia-teton-prepare.name: bactopia-teton-prepare
bactopia-teton-prepare.help: Prepare sample sheets for downstream analysis in the Teton workflow.

arguments.name: prefix
arguments.help: Prefix to use for output files.

arguments.name: run_type
arguments.help: The input run type (e.g. paired-end, single-end, ont).

options.name: version
options.help: Show the version and exit.

bactopia-update.name: bactopia-update
bactopia-update.help: Check if modules used by Bactopia Tools have newer versions available

options.name: version
options.help: Show the version and exit.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Print debug related text

options.name: silent
options.help: Only critical errors will be printed

options.name: bactopia_path
options.help: Directory where Bactopia repository is stored

options.name: module
options.help: Only check a specific module for updates (e.g. 'fastp')

options.name: max_retry
options.help: Maximum times to attempt API queries. (Default: 3)

options.name: output_json
options.help: Output flat JSON

options.name: pretty
options.help: Output pretty-printed JSON

bactopia-workflows.name: bactopia-workflows
bactopia-workflows.help: Output the path to a Bactopia workflow main.nf file.

options.name: version
options.help: Show the version and exit.

options.name: verbose
options.help: Print debug related text

options.name: silent
options.help: Only critical errors will be printed

options.name: bactopia_path
options.help: Directory where Bactopia repository is stored

options.name: wf
options.help: Build a environment for a the given workflow

options.name: list_wfs
options.help: List available Bactopia workflows and exit
